executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Judi Wood
executives.background: Former executive at various energy and industrial companies. Expert in human resources and governance.

executives.name: Rona Fairhead
executives.background: Former Minister of State for Trade and Export Promotion in the United Kingdom.

executives.name: Safra Catz
executives.background: Ms. Catz has been Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer since September 2014. She served as Oracle’s President from January 2004 to September 2014 and as Oracle’s Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2014 and 2005 to 2008.
